ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Proposal Presented for PACS service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Post Acute Care Services Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal Presented") && (ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Revenue__c)|| ISNULL(Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c)|| ISNULL(Subsidy__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Proposal Date, Patient Collections, Total Margin, Annual Encounters, and Subsidy.
